series_metadata.series_title: FULL PUBLIC RECORDS OF ENFORCEMENT ACTIONS
series_metadata.series_description: Board Order or Consent Agreement plus underlying investigation correspondence and materials documenting the Board''s activites not excluded from public records law.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy after action becomes public; entire paper file scanned to digital file on Board storage device and back-up device; Paper file destroyed after staff determines digital file''s integrity. ; Electronic: Retain digital file for 5 years after death of licensee unless under court order to retain longer., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
